rulings.Case Title: XIA MA VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MAY 19, 2008 LINE 7. DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Summary adjudication is granted as to the 1st cause of action given that plaintiff does not oppose the motion. The motion is denied as to the 2nd cause of action based on plaintiff's declaration at paragraph 12, her June 7, 2006 email to Henson and her deposition testimony to the effect that the eyewash stations were noncompliant. Plaintiff has stated a prima facie case for retaliation and the City has proffered a bona fide reason for termination. In turn, plaintiff's statement to Finley of plaintiff's intent to report violations to OHSA, followed by Finley placing plaintiff on a development plan, plaintiff's actual complaint to OHSA and shortly thereafter plaintiff's termination, presents evidence that would support a finding of pretext. See Green v. Ralee Engineering Co. (1998) 19 Cal.4th 66. =(302/PJM/VC)
